title: HScore as a diagnostic tool in ERBB2 equivocal (immunohistochemistry 2+) breast cancer.
snippet: ERBB2 is amplified or overexpressed in 15% to 20% of primary invasive breast cancers. Despite the aggressive nature of ERBB2-positive breast cancers, the development of anti-ERBB2 therapy has resulted in better prognoses. HScore is a scoring system that broadens immunohistochemistry (IHC) results into a quantitative range. The aim of this retrospective stud...
